title: Three dead, 7 rescued in boating tragedy as severe holiday weekend storm ravages Wisconsin tourist hotspot
description: A fast-moving storm capsized a boat Friday on Geneva Lake in Wisconsin, killing three people during the busy Fourth of July holiday weekend.
content:
